station_address: Ground Floor, Punjab Wadi, Sion - Trombay Rd, opposite Telecom Factory Road, Deonar, Chembur, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400088
text:
SCAM ALERT!

Workers here are totally fruad and so its their manager. While i was paying through POS machine and removed my eyes from display, guy here filled petrol of 250 instead of 320 and when i confronted him he says me that latch removed after 250 like bro I'm filling petrol for first time.
He typed 320 on another display and filling petrol from another. Even his manager was showing no concern when i told him about this, just brushing off by saying toworker that you should fill tank with the one where the amount is put, like making fool of customers.

Go through other reviews, everyone is complaining the same scam behaviour.
Avoid this pump at all cost.

station_address: Ground Floor, Punjab Wadi, Sion - Trombay Rd, opposite Telecom Factory Road, Deonar, Chembur, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400088
text:
Trained cheater’s
Taking good advantage of being on busy street (station road) people being in rush to notice cheating

I saw a advertisement on the petrol station saying 100 Rupees free petrol if you take a certain service
Mean while i got cheated for petrol he pumped 120 rupees less petrol and took full payment i noticed my meter didn’t indicated accuracy of amount i paid for

Hp petroleum please do not cheat people of india they know their ways to get back at you very well
Please Sudhar jao kind and humble request

Everyone please be extra cautious on hp petroleum stations they are trained cheaters

station_address: Ground Floor, Punjab Wadi, Sion - Trombay Rd, opposite Telecom Factory Road, Deonar, Chembur, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400088
text: It’s a blatant scam! It’s happened with us more than once now at this pump. Our car will not show even a single km rise in the fuel tank indicator. Sometimes the indicator delays in showing the amount after fueling, so we drove the car for a few metres and came back. But the indicator dipped instead of rising. When we refueled at another pump, the indicator went up immediately. These scammers will need just a moment of distraction on your end to run this scam and I’ve been warned by many local friends to avoid this pump at all cost. The staff is extremely rude and will not listen to you.

station_address: Ground Floor, Punjab Wadi, Sion - Trombay Rd, opposite Telecom Factory Road, Deonar, Chembur, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400088
text:
I went to check my  E- scooter tyres and puncture repair, inspite of relevant person free ,they made me wait and that person started using foul language,said you have purchased worst E -scooter and that he is fed up of E -scooters , the tyres have come out, and told me directly to the dealer to change tyres and doesn't want to check it also ... And VIOLA I got it checked from across the street, it was just a small puncture which was fixed within 10 minutes.
Even giving one star is much more than desired as the way he spoke to customer.
Seniors in charge of petrol pump need to look into the attitude of such staff members and rectify it ..

station_address: Ground Floor, Punjab Wadi, Sion - Trombay Rd, opposite Telecom Factory Road, Deonar, Chembur, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400088
text:
Nowadays the petrol pump is not accepting payments via UPI MODE .
The attendants were friendly and efficient, quickly filling up my tank . The station itself was clean and well-maintained, with plenty of pumps available and easy access.  Overall, I had a great experience at HP petrol pump and would definitely recommend it to others.
Also basic facilities like free air is available here

station_address: Ground Floor, Punjab Wadi, Sion - Trombay Rd, opposite Telecom Factory Road, Deonar, Chembur, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400088
text:
Yesterday i went to fill petrol in my 2 wheeler, but i was manipulated by the staff. I'd requested for filling 3 liter petrol however as soon as i was searching for my credit card in wallet the petrol filler scammed me with only 1.5-2 liters petrol. Even after argument they did not listen to me and took full money.

Never ever in my life ill fill petrol at this petrol pump.
